entries.name: burn
entries.description: Burn of skin or other tissue. Includes thermal, electrical, and chemical burns when not separately specified.

entries.name: scald
entries.description: Burn due to hot liquids or vapours (scald).

entries.name: laceration
entries.description: Laceration of skin: a deep cut or tear of the skin.

entries.name: cut
entries.description: Open wound of skin, including cuts and lacerations.

entries.name: abrasion
entries.description: Superficial injury of skin: abrasion or friction burn.

entries.name: fracture
entries.description: Fracture of bone: a break in the continuity of a bone.

entries.name: sprain
entries.description: Sprain or strain of joint or ligament.

entries.name: strain
entries.description: Strain or sprain of muscle or tendon.

entries.name: choking
entries.description: Foreign body in airway causing obstruction (choking).

entries.name: poisoning
entries.description: Poisoning by drugs, medications, or biological substances.

entries.name: heat stroke
entries.description: Heat stroke: a severe form of heat-related illness with body temperature above 40°C and central nervous system dysfunction.

entries.name: heat exhaustion
entries.description: Heat exhaustion: milder heat-related illness with symptoms such as heavy sweating, weakness, and cool, pale skin.

entries.name: hypothermia
entries.description: Hypothermia: a dangerous drop in body temperature below 35°C due to cold exposure.

entries.name: allergic reaction
entries.description: Allergic or hypersensitivity disorder: an exaggerated immune response to a foreign substance.

entries.name: anaphylaxis
entries.description: Anaphylaxis: a severe, potentially life-threatening allergic reaction requiring immediate emergency care.

entries.name: eye injury
entries.description: Injury to the eye or ocular adnexa.

entries.name: head injury
entries.description: Injury of head: includes concussion, skull fracture, and other intracranial injuries.

entries.name: electrical burn
entries.description: Burn due to electrical contact.

entries.name: chemical burn
entries.description: Burn due to chemical corrosion.

entries.name: nosebleed
entries.description: Epistaxis: bleeding from the nose.

entries.name: insect bite
entries.description: Effects of venom or other toxic substances from insects or arthropods following a bite or sting.

entries.name: animal bite
entries.description: Bite or strike by mammal (excluding venomous snake or insect).
